mapper.select:
SELECT C.*, CASE WHEN C.currentAmt > 0 AND (C.currentAmt * 100.0) / NULLIF(C.GOAL_AMT, 0) < 1 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ROUND((C.currentAmt * 100.0) / NULLIF(C.GOAL_AMT, 0)), 0) END AS achievementRate FROM ( SELECT CAMP_SEQ, TITLE, THUMB_PATH, GOAL_AMT, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, REG_DT, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE CAMP_SEQ = TB_CAMPAIGN.CAMP_SEQ AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS currentAmt, (SELECT COUNT(PAY_SEQ) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE CAMP_SEQ = TB_CAMPAIGN.CAMP_SEQ AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS donorCount, DATEDIFF(END_DT, CURDATE()) AS dDay FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount} ) C
SELECT COUNT(CAMP_SEQ) FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT C.*, CASE WHEN C.currentAmt > 0 AND (C.currentAmt * 100.0) / NULLIF(C.GOAL_AMT, 0) < 1 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ROUND((C.currentAmt * 100.0) / NULLIF(C.GOAL_AMT, 0)), 0) END AS achievementRate FROM ( SELECT CAMP_SEQ, TITLE, CONTENT, THUMB_PATH, GOAL_AMT, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, DEL_YN, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE CAMP_SEQ = TB_CAMPAIGN.CAMP_SEQ AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS currentAmt, (SELECT COUNT(PAY_SEQ) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE CAMP_SEQ = TB_CAMPAIGN.CAMP_SEQ AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS donorCount FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE CAMP_SEQ = #{campSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ) C

SELECT C.*, CASE WHEN C.currentAmt > 0 AND (C.currentAmt * 100.0) / NULLIF(C.GOAL_AMT, 0) < 1 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ROUND((C.currentAmt * 100.0) / NULLIF(C.GOAL_AMT, 0)), 0) END AS achievementRate FROM ( SELECT CAMP_SEQ, TITLE, CONTENT, THUMB_PATH, GOAL_AMT, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, DEL_YN, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(PAY_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE CAMP_SEQ = TB_CAMPAIGN.CAMP_SEQ AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS currentAmt, (SELECT COUNT(PAY_SEQ) FROM TB_DONATION_PAYMENT WHERE CAMP_SEQ = TB_CAMPAIGN.CAMP_SEQ AND PAY_STATUS = 'DONE') AS donorCount, DATEDIFF(END_DT, CURDATE()) AS dDay FROM TB_CAMPAIGN WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN START_DT AND END_DT ORDER BY REG_DT DESC LIMIT 1 ) C
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_CAMPAIGN
TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, GOAL_AMT = #{goalAmt}, START_DT = #{startDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, USE_YN = #{useYn},
THUMB_PATH = #{thumbPath},
MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW()
WHERE CAMP_SEQ = #{campSeq}
UPDATE TB_CAMPAIGN SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CAMP_SEQ = #{campSeq}
